metadata.method_name: M1' KG-Localized Single-Absorber Unlearning vs SUB-CONTEXT-Targeted Dense Erasure
metadata.description: DECISIVE comparison: at MATCHED forget-quality, ablate ONE KG-named absorber latent (KG-ABL, label-free/discovered) vs erase a SUB-CONTEXT-targeted diff-of-means direction u_sub (DENSE-SUB-ABL, built from the per-sub-context labels on a disjoint fold). WHOLE-parent erasure (DENSE-WHOLE-ABL) is a clearly-labeled SECONDARY reference. Per-case FORK verdict KG_BEATS_USUB / KG_MATCHES_USUB_LABEL_FREE / KG_LOSES_TO_USUB on a paired-bootstrap joint (retain-utility x fluency) CI + 2nd-family judge confirmation. Folds in u_sub localization validation (M1'), US-as-co-firing (M5), second-judge + human-proxy (M6), unit-vs-single (M7).

honest_negatives: HEADLINE REFRAMED: 'beats WHOLE-parent erasure' is RETIRED as the headline — the decisive comparator is now DENSE-SUB-ABL (a sub-context-labeled diff-of-means). WHOLE-parent erasure is reported only as a secondary reference.

DELETED FRAMING: the claim that 'a single dense hyperplane structurally cannot localize' / 'erasing is-a-country removes all countries' is FALSE and removed — u_sub is itself a single dense direction that localizes; KG-ABL is compared against it. We report whether u_sub localizes better than whole-parent (collateral_SUB < collateral_WHOLE) per case.

The win (where present) traces to the SINGLE discovered absorber, not to multi-member grouping (M7): the two-track algorithm is the label-free DISCOVERY PROCEDURE that surfaces the precise single absorber.

Absorption regime is NARROW (documented ~only for these structured sub-contexts); numeric sub-contexts sit below the SAE-reconstruction gate (taxonomic cosine ~0.876 region) and are out of scope here.
Toxicity/insult is a DECLARED co-firing negative pole — KG is predicted to lose (the sub-attributes co-fire with the toxic parent, no clean recall-hole).

taxonomic_georgia: at the KG-PINNED matched forget point (small, KG single-latent KL ceiling), u_sub and whole-parent collateral are ~tied (u_sub marginally higher); u_sub localizes strictly better at meaningful forget levels (curve frac_sub<whole=0.5555555555555556). KG's surgical edge comes from SPARSE-FIRING GATING (footprint->0), not from u_sub failing to localize the direction.

taxonomic_us RECLASSIFIED (M5) as co-firing/router-false-negative: the SPECIFIC absorber 846 firing-Jaccard with the parent is 0.03890784982935153 while the AGGREGATE parent-detector Jaccard is 0.04158669225847729 (parent recall-hole 0.16666666666666663); it is moved OUT of the absorption win-set and NOT counted toward the M1' gate.

taxonomic_us: over the achievable dense forget range u_sub did NOT localize better than whole-parent (frac_sub<whole=0.0); the sub-context direction is not cleanly separable here, weakening the 'stronger baseline' framing for this case (recorded; the KG-vs-SUB decisive joint outcome still stands).

taxonomic_us: at the KG-PINNED matched forget point (small, KG single-latent KL ceiling), u_sub and whole-parent collateral are ~tied (u_sub marginally higher); u_sub localizes strictly better at meaningful forget levels (curve frac_sub<whole=0.0). KG's surgical edge comes from SPARSE-FIRING GATING (footprint->0), not from u_sub failing to localize the direction.

toxicity_insult: KG_MATCHES_USUB_LABEL_FREE — KG-ABL MATCHES u_sub (joint CI includes 0) WITHOUT needing the sub-context partition/labels that u_sub requires (a label-free parity win, not a strict beat).
